name: ASRock B850M Challenger Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5Gb LAN (B850MCHALLENGER)
shortName: ASRock B850M Challenger Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Entry-level AM5 Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0 and DDR5-8000 support for gaming.
